channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Africa Reaffirms Support for One-China Principle Amid Taiwan-Separatist Moves
item.description: Recent political moves by Lai Ching-te, aimed at seeking international support for Taiwan's independence, have encountered significant resistance, particularly from Africa. eSwatini, the only African ...

item.title: Experts Raise Security Concerns Over Mandatory White House App on Government Devices
item.description: The Trump administration has directed federal agencies to install a new White House app on millions of government-issued devices, including iPhones and iPads. Launched in March, the app offers direct ...

item.title: Maharashtra Leads India’s Infrastructure Growth with Integrated Development Approach
item.description: During The Hindu’s Maharashtra Infrastructure Conclave 2026 held in Mumbai, M. Jamshed emphasised that infrastructure is not just a component but essentially synonymous with development itself. He hig...

item.title: Maku and Two Presidential Aspirants Cleared for Labour Party Primaries
item.description: On Friday, former Minister of Information, Labaran Maku, alongside two Labour Party presidential aspirants, Peter Agada and Samuel Nwigwe, successfully passed the party's screening exercise ahead of t...

item.title: US Intelligence Official Tulsi Gabbard Resigns Amid White House Pressure
item.description: Tulsi Gabbard, a senior intelligence official in the United States, has resigned from her position following pressure from the White House, according to a source familiar with the situation. Gabbard p...

item.title: Top Memorial Day Sales and Discounts for 2026
item.description: CNN Underscored has curated a comprehensive guide to the best Memorial Day 2026 deals across a wide range of products and retailers. The guide highlights 172 top offers, including discounts on tech ga...

item.title: Dr Yaseen Bismilla uses TikTok to educate on forensic pathology and justice
item.description: South African forensic pathologist Dr Yaseen Bismilla is transforming public understanding of medicine, death, and forensic science through TikTok. With a growing online following, he blends education...

item.title: Mercedes secures front row for Canadian Grand Prix sprint with Russell and Antonelli
item.description: At the Circuit Gilles Villeneuve in Montreal, George Russell clinched pole position for the Canadian Grand Prix sprint race, with his Mercedes teammate, and current Formula One championship leader, Ki...

item.title: Family Seeks Justice One Year After Isipingo Taxi Owner’s Murder
item.description: The family of Krish Reddy, a well-known taxi owner in Isipingo, continues to seek justice one year after he was brutally murdered in a drive-by shooting. Reddy, who owned Mastermind Taxis, was ambushe...

item.title: Stephen Colbert's 'Late Show' Finale Draws Record Audience Amid Feud with Trump
item.description: Stephen Colbert concluded his tenure on 'The Late Show' with a historic finale watched by an estimated 6.74 million viewers, marking the most-watched weeknight episode in the show's history. The episo...

item.title: Peter Mbah Confirmed as APC Governorship Candidate in Enugu for 2027 Election
item.description: Di Governor of Enugu State, Peter Mbah, don officially become di only APC governorship candidate for di 2027 election inside di state. Naija News report say di party primary election happen across all...

item.title: Tanzania Sends 60 Miners to Canada to Learn Modern Mining Techniques
item.description: Tanzania don start serious efforts to improve its artisanal and small-scale mining sector. Recently, 60 Tanzanian miners go Canada for eight-day study visit to learn from the advanced Canadian mining ...

item.title: Pritchard brothers remain focused on Wallabies dream amid PNG Chiefs talks
item.description: Kadin and Treyvon Pritchard, two of Australian rugby's promising young talents, have expressed their ongoing commitment to rugby union despite potential opportunities in rugby league with the PNG Chie...

item.title: Brooklyn Beckham supports wife Nicola Peltz at screening of her directorial debut Prima
item.description: Brooklyn Beckham recently expressed his admiration for his wife, Nicola Peltz, highlighting her dedication to her new film, Prima. The screening took place at the exclusive San Vicente Bungalows and w...

item.title: Edmonton woman found guilty of criminal negligence after fatal dog attack on 11-year-old
item.description: An Edmonton judge has convicted Crystal Jean MacDonald, 46, of criminal negligence causing death following a fatal dog attack that killed 11-year-old Kache Grist in 2024. The incident occurred at MacD...

item.title: Three men die and two survive after boat capsizes near Savary Island, B.C.
item.description: On Thursday night, a tragic boating accident occurred off the coast of Savary Island, British Columbia, resulting in the deaths of three men, with two others surviving. According to Powell River RCMP,...

item.title: Victor Bal graduates from Polytechnique with lifelong support from his service dog
item.description: Victor Bal, a 27-year-old mechanical engineering graduate from Polytechnique Montréal, will receive his degree alongside his service dog, Kopeck. Kopeck, an eight-year-old Labrador/Bernese Mountain Do...

item.title: Embracing the Joy of Doing Nothing in a Maxed-Out World
item.description: In a world obsessed with maximising productivity and self-improvement, Annabel Ross argues for the value of intentional laziness. Recounting her own experience recovering from pneumonia, she highlight...

item.title: Lamine Yamal Shows Solidarity Amid Controversy Over Palestinian Flag
item.description: Lamine Yamal, the 18-year-old Barcelona and Spanish national team winger, has sparked attention not just for his skills on the field but also for his public display of support for Palestine. Known for...

item.title: Government forwards 27 doctors’ names for action in bribery case
item.description: A government inquiry has found that 30 doctors accepted a luxury trip to Paris and Monaco, worth over Rs 1.9 crore, from AbbVie Pharma as a bribe. However, when the National Medical Commission (NMC) r...
